messages.content: Hi I'm looking to get a new gear replaced on my bike
Could you please provide me with the exact model of your bike and specify which gear you need to replace? This will help me find the right part for you.
Roamer gear to make motor move the chain
To assist you better, could you please provide the service code located on the back of the seat tube above the motor? This will help me identify the exact part you need for your Roamer 2.0.
